name: gestor-estudiantes
description: Sistema de Gestión de Estudiantes - Fullstack Application

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start:prod: cd backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node src/index.js
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run start:prod
